#  Add Observations to a Drawing (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To add observations to a drawing_ :
      * 'Read Only' or higher permissions on the project's Drawings tool.  
AND
      * 'Standard' or 'Admin' permissions on the project's Observations tool.
    * _To publish personal markups to the Published layer:_
      * 'Standard' or 'Admin' permissions on the project's Drawings tool. See [What is the difference between personal and published markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * Automatic publishing for observation pins can be turned on or off in the 'Auto-Publish Obs Pins' toggle.
    * This action can be performed in offline mode if the drawing has already been downloaded to the device. Tasks performed in offline mode will be synced with Procore once a network connection has been reestablished.


##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Procore** app on your iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the project's **Drawings** tool.
  3. Tap the drawing you want to add an observation to.
  4. Tap the **pin**
  5. Tap the **observation** ![Icon Drawing Markup Observation Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/41caf1c9cd9f464eb32b61308d3ea9f9/70995ff59417ba0e2d5063a7e1207855/icon-drawing-markup-observation-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=18) icon.
  6. Tap the area of the drawing you want to add the observation to.
  7. After the observation item has been placed, you can add an existing observation or create a new one.
     * **To link an existing observation,** tap **Link Existing** and select an observation.
     * **To create a new observation** :
       1. Tap an observation template.  
OR  
Tap **+Create Without Template**.
       2. Enter the necessary information to create the observation. See [Create an Observation (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/observations-ios/tutorials/create-an-observation-ios).
  8. Tap **Save**.  
_Note:_ The color of the pin denotes the status of the observation.
     * **Blue** : Open
     * **Yellow** : Ready for Review
     * **Red** : Not Accepted
     * **Gray** : Closed
  9. _Optional:_ To publish the observation pin:
    1. Tap the **Select** icon, then tap the observation pin.  
_Note:_ If you want to publish multiple markups at once, select the **Lasso** option under 'Select', then draw a shape around the markups.
    2. Tap **Publish**.  
_Note:_ If you want Procore to automatically publish observation pins as they are added, tap the **Auto-Publish Obs Pins** toggle to the **ON** position.


## See Also
  * [Mark Up a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/mark-up-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Create Observations with Quick Capture from a Drawing (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/tutorials/create-observations-with-quick-capture-from-a-drawing-ios)
  * [Drawings (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-ios/permissions)
